_comment: Optional auto-tracking hooks for Claude Code (and agents with compatible hook systems).
Copy the entries you want into your agent's hook config, or point to this file.
Set TOKENME_DIR to the folder where you cloned/installed tokenme.
Tracking is 100% local. No network. Remove entries to stop tracking.
WINDOWS NOTE: Claude Code on Windows (no Git Bash on PATH) — use the
'command_win' value instead of 'command'. The PowerShell variant uses

PostToolUse._note: Layer 3 — track tool output tokens (Read, Bash, Grep, Glob, MCP)
Layer 2 — track code written per turn (Write, Edit, MultiEdit)

Stop._note: Layer 1 — track model response length at end of each turn

setup.macOS_linux: export TOKENME_DIR=~/tokenme  # or wherever you cloned it
